# MESI

> MESI (Mechanical & Electrical Systems Integration) is a multidisciplinary engineering and industrial solutions company based in Centurion, Gauteng, South Africa, serving the mining, manufacturing, and infrastructure sectors across Southern Africa.

MESI operates through six specialist divisions and offers an integrated, one-call service across all of them.

## Divisions

- **Automation & Electrical**: PLC programming, SCADA system development, MCC panel manufacturing, instrumentation engineering, electrical installations, industrial IoT integration, CCTV & access control, solar & UPS installations.
- **Mechanical & Mining**: Mill and crusher maintenance, conveyor system installations, belt splicing, laser and drive train alignments, bearing installations, fabrication, full plant shutdown projects.
- **Payload & Weighing**: Payload monitoring systems, truck scale systems, volumetric scanning, underground weighing, fleet monitoring and analytics, calibration and certification.
- **Logistics & Transport**: Road freight, mining equipment transport, heavy and abnormal load transport, cross-border logistics, fleet management, warehousing support.
- **Industrial Supplies**: Electrical, mechanical, mining, and safety equipment supply — components, bearings, pumps, valves, gearboxes, PPE, conveyor components.
- **Projects & Engineering**: Turnkey project management, engineering design, feasibility studies, construction management, commissioning support.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://mesigroup.co.za/): company overview
- [About](https://mesigroup.co.za/about.html): vision, mission, core values, BEE/transformation status, HSE commitment
- [Divisions](https://mesigroup.co.za/divisions.html): full detail on all six divisions and their services
- [Contact](https://mesigroup.co.za/contact.html): enquiry form, office address, phone, email
